meta_title: Removals Eastbourne - Storage Eastbourne - Eastbourne Removals
meta_description: We are one of Eastbourne's leading Moving Company's & Removals Company’s throughout Sussex since 1982 - Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage.
intro_paragraph: Premier Moving & Storage Company with Prestige Steel Strong Rooms — serving Eastbourne, Newhaven, Lewes, Brighton and all Sussex.

faqs.q: How far in advance should I book my Eastbourne removal?
faqs.a: We recommend booking 4–6 weeks ahead during peak Sussex moving season (May to September). For off-peak moves we can often accommodate 1–2 weeks' notice. A 20% deposit locks in your guaranteed move date.

faqs.q: Do you cover Newhaven, Lewes and the rest of East Sussex?
faqs.a: Yes. From our Eastbourne and A22 Lower Dicker bases we cover the whole of East Sussex including Newhaven, Lewes, Seaford, Hastings and Bexhill, plus West Sussex (Brighton, Worthing, Hove) and Surrey (Guildford, Reigate, Woking).

faqs.q: What if my move date changes?
faqs.a: There is no charge for postponements, cancellations or key waits. We simply update the diary at no extra cost — one of the things our Sussex customers tell us they value most.

faqs.q: Do you offer secure storage between moves?
faqs.a: Yes — our Lower Dicker site offers individual steel Prestige self-storage rooms with 24-hour CCTV and alarmed access. Ideal for short-term storage between Sussex moves or longer-term household storage.

faqs.q: Can you handle international removals from Sussex?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We are a founder member of Your Moving Group with vetted partner agents in over 200 countries. See our overseas removals page for more on international moves from Sussex.

raw_body:
EMAIL US

Eastbourne Removals & Storage Experts Since 1982

Premier Moving & Storage Company with Prestige Steel Strong Rooms — serving Eastbourne, Newhaven, Lewes, Brighton and all Sussex.

LOCAL, NATIONAL & WORLDWIDE SERVICES

REQUEST A QUOTE

1982 - 2022 Celebrating 40 Years in The Moving & Storage Industry

Individual Self Store Rooms for Your home

UNIFORMED STAFF AND IMMACULATE VANS

Moving Home? We can make your journey as 'Smooth as Silk'

A Removals Specialist You Can Trust To Look after Your Home

We are unique within the Moving & Storage Industry. We offer our clients a far superior Moving Service, how this works; We fully pad wrap all your furniture pieces in your home prior to moving them using large thick quilted pads, each piece is wrapped and labelled. We then remove them, transport them and deliver them into your new home and into the appropriate room, only then do we unwrap your furniture and place each piece in it’s final position. Ultra Safe Moving Services. We also guarantee ANY Move date based on and at the point of receiving your 20% deposit we guarantee and honour any Move date you supply us with.

There's also no charge for key waits, postponements or cancelations. Should your Move date change, this is just a simple procedure of updating our work diary with no additional cost to you.

The Removals firm you choose to move your possessions is very important. You want to know that you have secured good value, but you also need to be confident that the team arriving on the morning will understand your requirements properly, and have both training and equipment necessary to ensure success.

Mark Ratcliffe has been working in the UK domestic removals market for more than 40 years and at Mark Ratcliffe Moving we take quality very seriously. We are one of just a handful of firms with a dedicated staff training centre, and all of our staff are trained to the highest industry standards in packing fragile and non-fragile personal effects, moving and wrapping household furniture for home and overseas moving as well as vehicle loading and customer services. This means you can expect real commitment from everyone involved in your move.

We would be delighted to give you a quote without any obligation. Please call our A22 Lower Dicker office on 01323 848008 to talk through your moving requirements.

Whether moving in the UK or abroad, Mark Ratcliffe Moving is ready to help and we can meet all of your wider needs such as secure storage or export packing and/or unpacking.

Mark Ratcliffe

Why Sussex Homeowners Choose Mark Ratcliffe Moving

For more than four decades we have helped families relocate across Eastbourne, Newhaven, Lewes, Brighton, Hastings and the wider Sussex and Surrey region. Here's what makes our removal service genuinely different:

  • Full pad-wrap protection on every move. Each item of furniture is individually quilted, wrapped and labelled in your home before it leaves the room — and only unwrapped once it reaches its final position in your new home.
  • Guaranteed move date. Once your 20% deposit is received, your move date is locked in — no slippage, no surprises.
  • No charge for key waits, postponements or cancellations. Life happens; we simply update the diary at no extra cost.
  • Trained, uniformed crews. All our removers are trained at our dedicated staff training centre to industry-leading standards for fragile packing, furniture handling and vehicle loading.
  • Prestige steel storage rooms in Lower Dicker. Individual containerised rooms with 24-hour CCTV and alarmed access — ideal between moves or for long-term household storage.
  • Local roots, worldwide reach. Founder member of Your Moving Group with overseas partner agents in 200+ countries for international relocations.

Areas We Cover Across Sussex & Surrey

Our Eastbourne and A22 Lower Dicker depots make us perfectly placed for removals throughout East Sussex, West Sussex and Surrey. Popular routes include Eastbourne, Newhaven, Lewes, Brighton, Hastings, Bexhill, Seaford, Tunbridge Wells, Haywards Heath and East Grinstead. Visit our full areas covered page for the complete list.

What Our Sussex Customers Say

“From the survey to the final box being unpacked, the Mark Ratcliffe team handled our Eastbourne-to-Lewes move with absolute care. Every piece of furniture was pad-wrapped and labelled — nothing arrived with a scratch.”
— S. Patel, Lewes
“Used Mark Ratcliffe for our move from Newhaven to Brighton and then six months of storage. Uniformed crew, immaculate vans, secure steel storage room — worth every penny.”
— J. Williams, Brighton

Read more customer testimonials →

Frequently Asked Questions

How far in advance should I book my Eastbourne removal?

We recommend booking 4–6 weeks ahead during peak Sussex moving season (May to September). For off-peak moves we can often accommodate 1–2 weeks' notice. A 20% deposit locks in your guaranteed move date.

Do you cover Newhaven, Lewes and the rest of East Sussex?

Yes. From our Eastbourne and A22 Lower Dicker bases we cover the whole of East Sussex including Newhaven, Lewes, Seaford, Hastings and Bexhill, plus West Sussex (Brighton, Worthing, Hove) and Surrey (Guildford, Reigate, Woking).

What if my move date changes?

There is no charge for postponements, cancellations or key waits. We simply update the diary at no extra cost — one of the things our Sussex customers tell us they value most.

Do you offer secure storage between moves?

Yes — our Lower Dicker site offers individual steel Prestige self-storage rooms with 24-hour CCTV and alarmed access. Ideal for short-term storage between Sussex moves or longer-term household storage.

Can you handle international removals from Sussex?

Absolutely. We are a founder member of Your Moving Group with vetted partner agents in over 200 countries. See our overseas removals page for more on international moves from Sussex.

You can count on us for all of the following

dedicated equipment, materials and vehicles that protect your possessions

specialist removal men who have the experience to cope with any eventuality

a local service - but with comprehensive international options too

Founder member of 
Your Moving Group

an all-inclusive quote that reflects your need to control costs.

Please call Shannon on 01323 848008 whenever it's most convenient. We very much look forward to hearing from you.
